description: single-address (v1) delegation under a v1.2-federation verifier — proves the existing v1 case continues to verify byte-identically

expected.canonical_message:
oc-agent:delegation:v1
principal: bc1qprincipal000000000000000000000000000000
agent: bc1qagent0000000000000000000000000000000000
scopes: mcp:invoke(server=https://mcp.example.com,tool=invoice.create)
bond_sats: 0
bond_attestation: none
issued_at: 2026-04-22T12:00:00Z
expires_at: 2026-04-29T12:00:00Z
nonce: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

notes: Proves the additivity claim in FEDERATION.md §8: a v1.2-federation verifier handling a v1 single-address envelope returns a verdict byte-identical to a v1 verifier on the same envelope. No principal.alg disambiguation is needed because principal.alg is required and 'bip322' vs 'federation' is a discriminated union — the verifier dispatches on it.
